title: BatchLoadDetailsResponse
description: Schema for BatchLoadDetailsResponse in Nuix REST API

loadedOn.description: The date and time the batch was loaded represented in milliseconds since the epoch.

operatingSystem.description: The name of the operating system the batch was loaded under.

operatingSystemArchitecture.description: The operating system architecture the batch was loaded under

processArchitecture.description: process architecture the batch was loaded under

dataSettings.description: The data settings for the batch load as a map.

dataProcessingSettings.description: The data processing settings for the batch load as a map.

parallelProcessingSettings.description: The parallel processing settings for the batch load as a map

caseEvidenceSettings.description: The case evidence settings for the batch load as a map.

additionalSettings.description: The additional settings for the batch load as a map.
